instruction: The user's language is English (en). Conduct the Q&A conversation in English. All questions, example answers, and the story title (label) must be in English.
example_variables:
Stamina: number, 80
Trust: number, 10
Faction: string, Freelancer
example_goal: After the meeting at the Neon Abyss bar, the protagonist follows the chip's trail into the black market, navigating between factions. A sudden betrayal destroys every lead, cornering the protagonist. When the truth surfaces, the choice is theirs — who to trust, what to destroy, who to become.
